deployment_question: How does the model extrapolate to material families, composition clusters, or structures absent from training?
definition: Cluster materials by composition, structure, kernel similarity, or material family and hold out clusters or composition regimes.

split_operator.spectra_mapping: samples a low-overlap material-family or composition operating point

implementation_recipe: Choose composition, structure, or kernel features.
Cluster materials or define composition regimes.
Hold out entire clusters and report residual nearest-train similarity.
quality_gates: Report feature representation and clustering method.
Check whether held-out clusters correspond to meaningful material families.
Separate structure novelty from composition novelty.
failure_modes: Composition-only splits may miss structural novelty.
Clusters can be dominated by common elements.
Some properties may be target-range shifted rather than composition shifted.

citations.title: Random projections and Kernelised Leave One Cluster Out Cross-Validation
citations.evidence: Uses kernelized leave-one-cluster-out cross-validation for materials property evaluation.

citations.title: Structure-based out-of-distribution materials property prediction
citations.evidence: Benchmarks GNNs on structure-based OOD materials property prediction.
